category.name: zoo.window.gift.superFeedPack
category.item: Today on offer - superfood packages! Choose between 3 options: "Good start", "Master" and "Expert". As an expert, you can send additional gifts to your 5 friends. Don't hesitate!

category.name: zoo.window.gift.recipients
category.item: Choose 5 friends and send each one a gift:

category.name: zoo.window.gift.unwrapped
category.item: You have received the following gift:
Your gift will be debited from your account immediately after unwrapping.
